<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Twilio\Http; final class File { /** * @var string */ private $fileName; /** * @var resource|string|mixed|null */ private $contents; /** * @var string|null */ private $contentType; /** * @param string $fileName full file path or file name for passed $contents * @param string|resource|mixed|null $contents * @param ?string $contentType */ public function __construct(string $fileName, $contents = null, ?string $contentType = null) { $this->fileName = $fileName; $this->contents = $contents; $this->contentType = $contentType; } /** * @return resource|string|mixed|null */ public function getContents() { return $this->contents; } public function getFileName(): string { return $this->fileName; } public function getContentType(): ?string { return $this->contentType; } }
